creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Did you know about the new @bridgertonnetflix immersive pop-up in @libertylondon 😍

💐 Take a seat under the Bridgerton pavilion
🛁 Visit Benedict’s bed chambers, and see THAT bathtub 👀
🎭 See the real masquerade masks worn by the cast
🌸 Discover the @libertyfabrics & Bridgerton Collection

🗓️ Until March 23, The Fourth Floor, Liberty London
📍 Regent St., Carnaby, W1B 5AH
